approvedBy: Steve requested Canva API setup for brand asset access + Codex senior-engineer Foundation session
notes: Approved as a bounded Canva client foundation sprint. Scope: wrap existing Canva Connect API credentials into lib/canva-client.js, prove refresh-token auth, refresh-token rotation detection, one-line .env replacement under explicit --update-refresh-token --apply posture, folders/designs/assets/brand-template metadata reads, redaction, optional live read-only smoke, and no provider spend. Not approved: Canva writes/uploads/exports/design creation, Marketing Video Lab wiring, server routes, DB schema, hub UI, broad Canva ingestion, Drive permission mutation, Meeting Vault ACL Phase B, paid-source auth, or broad source extraction.
